Bash(python -c "
import json
import os

# 读取JSON文件
with open(''data/games.json'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8'') as f:
    games = json.load(f)

# 为每个游戏添加isRelated字段
for i, game in enumerate(games):
    if i < 30:  # 前30个游戏
        game[''isRelated''] = True
    else:  # 其余游戏
        game[''isRelated''] = False

# 写回文件，保持原有格式
with open(''data/games.json'', ''w'', encoding=''utf-8'') as f:
    json.dump(games, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)

print(f''已为{len(games)}个游戏添加isRelated字段'')
print(f''前30个游戏: isRelated = true'')
print(f''其余{len(games)-30}个游戏: isRelated = false'')
")
